symptoms.symptom_name: Constant nausea with diffuse crampy abdominal pain for ~48h, unrelieved by antacids

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Adjustment disorder with stress-related somatic symptoms
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Functional GI upset via the brain-gut axis is common in chronic stress, but is non-specific.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute intra-abdominal pathology (appendicitis / peptic ulcer disease)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: New unremitting nausea and abdominal pain must trigger exclusion of a surgical abdomen before a stress attribution.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pain is diffuse/non-focal rather than sharp and localised

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diffuse non-migratory pain is less typical of appendicitis, but early appendicitis can be diffuse — history alone cannot exclude it.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Adjustment disorder with stress-related somatic symptoms
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diffuse, hard-to-localise abdominal discomfort is characteristic of functional/stress-related GI symptoms.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tension-type headache (tight band around the head)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Adjustment disorder with stress-related somatic symptoms
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tension headache is a classic somatic manifestation of chronic stress.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic exhaustion unrelieved by rest, with insomnia, over months

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Adjustment disorder with occupational secondary traumatic stress
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-restorative fatigue is a core feature of compassion fatigue / secondary traumatic stress.
Fatigue and insomnia overlap with depression — requires mood screen to differentiate.

symptoms.symptom_name: Emotional numbness, flat mood, hopelessness and 'nothing matters'

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Adjustment disorder with occupational secondary traumatic stress
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Emotional numbing, detachment and hopelessness are hallmark features of secondary traumatic stress / compassion fatigue.
Hopelessness and anhedonia require an active depression and suicide-risk assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Irritability toward colleagues and allies; cynical/dark humour

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Adjustment disorder with occupational secondary traumatic stress
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Cynicism and irritability toward the people one serves are classic compassion-fatigue features.

symptoms.symptom_name: High-exposure advocacy work with avoidance of news/advocacy content and guilt about rest

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Adjustment disorder with occupational secondary traumatic stress
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sustained secondary trauma exposure with avoidance is the causal context for compassion fatigue.

symptoms.symptom_name: No vomiting, no diarrhoea, no haematemesis, no fever

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of vomiting, diarrhoea and fever argues against infective gastroenteritis.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute intra-abdominal pathology (appendicitis / peptic ulcer disease)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reassuring but does not exclude — early appendicitis can be afebrile without vomiting.

symptoms.symptom_name: No sharp/unbearable pain, no board-like abdomen, tolerating fluids

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No peritonitic history and preserved fluid intake are reassuring, but do not substitute for an in-person exam.

symptoms.symptom_name: Soft, non-distended abdomen with mild diffuse tenderness, NO guarding/rigidity/rebound, active bowel sounds

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of peritonism on palpation is the key finding excluding a surgical abdomen — a clinician-only sign, sealed; the AI Doctor cannot obtain it and must escalate to in-person assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Afebrile with stable vital signs (BP 130/80, HR 92, RR 16, SpO2 98%, Temp 36.8)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Stable, afebrile vitals argue against sepsis and severe dehydration — clinician-measured, sealed; the AI Doctor cannot obtain these and must not assume them.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Adjustment disorder with occupational secondary traumatic stress
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Emotional numbing, cynicism/irritability, non-restorative exhaustion and avoidance in a high-exposure advocacy role together characterise compassion fatigue.
Diffuse GI upset and tension headache as somatic expressions of chronic stress — valid only once an organic cause is excluded in person.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent in-person abdominal examination and vital signs
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The single most important step — palpation and vitals exclude an acute surgical abdomen and dehydration; the AI Doctor must arrange this rather than reassure remotely.
Hopelessness and emotional numbness with 'nothing matters' mandate a direct, sensitive suicide-risk screen during the consultation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: FBC, CRP and urinalysis (as arranged by the in-person clinician)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Support exclusion of infection/inflammation if the in-person assessment raises concern; not orderable via telehealth chat.
Supports the compassion-fatigue diagnosis and management planning once organic causes are excluded.
Not an AI-Doctor decision and not first-line remotely — imaging is directed by the in-person clinician after examination; over-ordering is inappropriate.
